title: Yihe Jinmao Palace
description: Yihe Jinmao Palace is located in Haidian District, Beijing, outside the Summer Palace, at the intersection of the Three Hills and Five Gardens, the Western Hills Villa Area, and the Haidian Science and Education Zone. The project is well-connected to major transportation routes, with quick access to Xizhimen, Financial Street, Wanliu, and Zhongguancun via Xing Shi Kou Road and Si Ji Qing Bridge. The low-density villa area offers a serene environment and convenient travel.
address: No. 39, Xingshikou Road, Xishan, Haidian District

title: Tomson Riviera
description: Tomson Riviera is an iconic luxury residential complex located in the heart of Shanghai's Pudong District. Situated along the Huangpu River, it offers unparalleled views of the Bund and the city skyline. The property is renowned for its world-class design, premium amenities, and prime location, making it one of the most prestigious addresses in Shanghai. Residents enjoy easy access to Lujiazui Financial District, upscale shopping centers, and top-tier international schools, all within minutes. The low-density, high-rise towers provide a serene living environment with state-of-the-art security and privacy.
address: No. 28, Huayuan Shiqiao Road, Pudong District

title: Wanliu Academy
description: Wanliu Academy, developed by Zhonghe Real Estate, is a prestigious residential complex located in the heart of Beijing's Haidian District. Known for its luxurious design and serene environment, it is one of the most sought-after addresses in the city. The property offers a perfect blend of modern amenities and traditional elegance, making it ideal for discerning residents. With its proximity to top-tier schools, shopping centers, and cultural landmarks, Wanliu Academy provides an unparalleled living experience.
address: No. 9, Wanliu Huafu North Street, Haidian District

title: Shenzhen Bay One
description: Shenzhen Bay One is a world-class luxury residential and commercial complex located in the Nanshan District of Shenzhen. Renowned for its iconic architecture and unparalleled amenities, it stands as a symbol of modern luxury and sophistication. The property offers breathtaking views of Shenzhen Bay and the Hong Kong skyline, providing residents with a serene and exclusive living experience. With its proximity to the Shenzhen Bay Super Headquarters Base, upscale shopping centers, and international schools, Shenzhen Bay One is the epitome of urban elegance and convenience.
address: No. 3088, Central Road (Shenzhen Bay Section), Shekou Street, Nanshan District

title: Wulin One
description: Wulin One is a prestigious luxury residential complex located in the heart of Hangzhou, renowned for its prime location and exceptional design. Situated in the bustling Wulin business district, it offers residents a perfect blend of urban convenience and serene living. The property features stunning views of the city skyline and the nearby Grand Canal, providing a unique living experience. With its proximity to high-end shopping centers, cultural landmarks, and top-tier schools, Wulin One is the ultimate choice for those seeking a luxurious lifestyle in Hangzhou.
address: No. 66, Hushu South Road
